description: Domestic PEP — elected state senator with spouse as joint account holder, Enhanced Due Diligence required
parsed_text:
CUSTOMER DUE DILIGENCE — JOINT ACCOUNT / PEP DISCLOSURE
Primary Account Holder: Senator Gerald Fontaine
Customer Type: Individual (Joint Account)
Date of Birth: 1966-02-14   SSN: XXX-XX-3308
Address: 44 Magnolia Court, Baton Rouge, LA 70801, USA
Phone: (225) 555-0109   Email: gerald.fontaine@example.com
Occupation: Elected Official — State Senator, Louisiana Senate District 12
Source of Funds: Legislative salary, law firm partnership income (prior), rental properties
Expected Monthly Activity: $28,000

JOINT ACCOUNT HOLDER
Name: Renee Fontaine (Spouse)
Date of Birth: 1969-08-30   SSN: XXX-XX-7741
Occupation: Educator — Baton Rouge Parish School System
Relationship to Primary: Spouse

PEP STATUS
Primary Holder PEP Classification: Domestic PEP — Currently serving elected state official.
Joint Holder PEP Classification: Close Associate / Family Member of Domestic PEP.
PEP Status: YES — Gerald Fontaine is a domestic PEP per FinCEN and internal policy. Renee Fontaine flagged as PEP family member.
EDD Required: Yes — both holders flagged under PEP provisions.

IDENTITY DOCUMENTS (PRIMARY)
ID Type: Driver License   ID Number: DL-LA-XX2291   Expiration: 2028-03-15

IDENTITY DOCUMENTS (JOINT)
ID Type: Driver License   ID Number: DL-LA-XX0044   Expiration: 2026-07-22

SCREENING RESULTS
OFAC / SDN: Clear — no match.
PEP Database (World-Check): MATCH — Gerald Fontaine confirmed as Louisiana State Senator elected 2018, re-elected 2022. Profile reviewed and accepted per EDD policy.
Adverse Media: One reference found — 2023 local news article regarding legislative vote dispute; no criminal or fraud implication. Reviewed and noted.

EDD ACTIONS COMPLETED
1. PEP questionnaire completed and signed by primary holder.
2. Source of wealth documented: W-2 and Schedule K-1 reviewed.
3. Rental property deeds on file.
4. Senior compliance officer approval obtained.
5. Annual review calendar set.
CDD Level: Enhanced
Risk Rating: High
Review Date: 2025-08-19   Reviewer: Denise Tran
